transcript.text: Hello, this video is what I think about environmentalism.

And so the rites and the rituals of the environmentalists, you know, recycle, only buy products that are good for the environment and don't buy products that are bad for the environment.
Maybe the rites and the rituals and the beliefs are wanting to save the environment.
Now, I think environmentalism is the, I don't think you can go too far with environmentalism.

Maybe as far as like drilling for oil, that would be something that maybe being, yeah, I wouldn't want to be too environmentalism about America because I think it's good for America to not be dependent on oil.

And then when they stop making, suddenly stop making money on oil, they could just blame it on us.
So maybe we should kind of ease out of that now so that they will have, they will kind of kickstart them into going, oh, okay, maybe we should start to diversify our economy a little bit.
And also, you know, for national security's sake, we should try to, I would be all for drilling for more oil in America, in Alaska, and off the coast of the Gulf Coast.
But other than that, environmentalism would also be, you know, investing lots of money on renewable energy, though, also.
